mano_cua.result_summary: 页面有 slider 和 button 组件。mano-cua 观察到滑块区域左键点击反复触发右键上下文菜单（疑似 BeerCSS slider 组件事件处理异常），以及滑块在非滑块区域点击后 thumb 位置异常跳变。但 50 步超时未完成对涟漪效果和焦点状态恢复的完整验证。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Observed anomalous context menu triggering on left-click in slider area, and slider thumb jumping when clicking heading area. Could not complete full verification of ripple effect and focus state recovery before timeout.
